forest-d2.title: The Blackness Between Trees
text: So dark here the trees disappear into nothing.
The fog is thicker here, pressing close.

marker.roomDesc: A stone marker sits half-sunk in the ground, older than the trees.
marker.lookText: One side is smooth — intentionally so. Whatever was carved here has been scraped clean.

fog.roomDesc: The fog here is different — thicker, and somehow intentional.
fog.lookText: You reach into it. Your hand disappears. For a moment you feel something reach back. Maybe throwing something in would provoke a response.

silence.roomDesc: A silence hangs here that feels deliberate, like something removed the sound.
silence.lookText: Not just quiet. Wrong. Like something removed the sound on purpose.

roomDescByRace.goblin: One of your kind — a goblin — crouches in the darkness, watching.
roomDescByRace.human: A goblin crouches in the darkness. You can feel it watching.
roomDescByRace.elf: A goblin stirs in the dark. Low. Patient. Hungry.

lookTextByRace.goblin: Smaller than you expected. Meaner than you hoped. It sizes you up the same way you're sizing it up.
lookTextByRace.human: A goblin. Ragged, quick-eyed, and very aware of you.
lookTextByRace.elf: A goblin. It watches you with the focused attention of something that has decided you are interesting.

resetMsgByRace.goblin: The dark swallows everything. Even you feel less certain you exist.
resetMsgByRace.human: The blackness shifts. The silence deepens.
resetMsgByRace.elf: The darkness resets itself. Something was watching. Now it is not.

msgByRace.goblin: The coin vanishes into the fog. A beat of silence. Then a low sound — not animal, not quite not-animal. Something moves.
msgByRace.human: The coin disappears into the black. A pause. Then something shifts in the fog. You hear breathing that isn't yours.
msgByRace.elf: The coin disappears. The silence changes texture. Something that was still is no longer still.
